title: pavonia columella
intro: Pavonia columella, also known as the rock rose, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pavonia columella include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
